info.title: SpexCrafters API
info.description: REST API for the SpexCrafters Global B2B Optical Marketplace and Sourcing Platform. Sprint 1 surface: identity vertical slice (registration, email verification, login, token refresh, logout, current user). This committed spec is the contract of record; the Spring Boot application must produce a compatible document (validated in CI), and the TypeScript client in packages/api-client is generated from it.

tags.name: auth
tags.description: Registration, email verification, and session tokens

tags.name: organizations
tags.description: Organization tenancy: creation, membership, roles, invitations. Non-members receive 404 for org resources (existence concealment); members lacking a capability receive 403. See docs/architecture/organizations-capability-model.md.

tags.name: supplier
tags.description: Supplier onboarding: application lifecycle, profile + translations, evidence, org-scoped capabilities. Non-members receive 404 (existence concealment); members lacking a capability receive 403. See docs/architecture/supplier-domain-model.md.

tags.name: verification
tags.description: Scope-based supplier verification (no verified boolean). Reads are org-scoped; grant/suspend/revoke are platform-staff-only.

tags.name: platform
tags.description: Platform-staff moderation (reviewer workflow, supplier suspension, verification decisions). Authorized by platform capabilities, never by an organization role.

tags.name: reference
tags.description: Reference data and localization: supported locales.

tags.name: taxonomy
tags.description: Master optical taxonomy & specification registry: categories, attributes, enumerations, units, countries, certifications, brands, specification templates. Public reads; platform-staff-only administration.

get.summary: List the supported locales (BCP 47 codes, direction, fallback)

parameters.name: locale
parameters.description: Requested display locale (BCP 47); unknown values fall back to en.

get.summary: Public localized supplier profile foundation (ACTIVE suppliers only)

200.description: The localized profile foundation with language-state metadata.

post.summary: Create a supplier identity, its DRAFT application and profile (requires supplier.create; one active supplier per organization)

get.summary: Get a supplier application (requires supplier.read)

patch.summary: Update draft content (requires supplier.update; DRAFT/CHANGES_REQUESTED only; optimistic version)

post.summary: Submit (or resubmit) the application for review (requires supplier.submit; enforces completeness)
Withdraw the application (requires supplier.withdraw; frees the org's supplier slot)

get.summary: List change requests raised against the application (requires supplier.read)

post.summary: Respond to a change request (requires supplier.update)

get.summary: Get the full supplier profile with translations and facilities (requires supplier.read)

put.summary: Create or update a profile translation (requires supplier.update; original language preserved; edits mark other locales stale)

post.summary: Approve a profile translation (requires supplier.update)
Reject a profile translation (requires supplier.update)
Add a facility with its original-language name/description (requires supplier.update)

get.summary: List finalized evidence (requires supplier.evidence.read)

post.summary: Initiate a presigned direct-to-storage upload (requires supplier.evidence.upload)

201.description: Upload ticket with a short-lived presigned PUT.

post.summary: Finalize an upload: verify presence, size, sha256 and magic bytes (idempotent; requires supplier.evidence.upload)

get.summary: Backend-streamed evidence download (org supplier.evidence.read for own org, or platform supplier.review.read; fail-closed to downloadable states)
Get scope-based verification status (requires supplier.verification.read)
Cursor page of the reviewer queue (requires supplier.review.read)

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Opaque cursor from the previous page's nextCursor.

get.summary: Reviewer detail: lifecycle, profile, evidence, change requests (requires supplier.review.read)

post.summary: Claim a submitted application for review (requires supplier.review.claim)
Request changes with a reason (requires supplier.review.request_changes)
Approve the application, activating the supplier (requires supplier.review.approve)
Reject the application (requires supplier.review.reject)
Suspend an operational supplier (requires supplier.suspend)
Grant a verification scope with evidence linkage (requires supplier.verification.grant)
Suspend a granted verification scope (requires supplier.verification.suspend)
Revoke a verification scope (requires supplier.verification.revoke)
Register a new user account
Confirm an email address with a single-use token

204.description: Email verified. Idempotent for an already-consumed token belonging to a verified user.

post.summary: Re-send the verification email
post.description: Uniform 202 regardless of account existence or state — no account enumeration.

202.description: Accepted. If a matching unverified account exists, an email is sent.

post.summary: Authenticate with email and password
post.description: Returns a short-lived bearer access token and an opaque rotating refresh token. Consumed exclusively by the web BFF, which holds tokens server-side and issues an HttpOnly session cookie to the browser. Sprint-1 password grant; Authorization Code + PKCE via Spring Authorization Server is the planned Sprint-2 upgrade (ADR-006).

post.summary: Exchange a refresh token for a new token pair
post.description: Refresh tokens are single-use and rotate on every call; reuse of a consumed token revokes the whole family (theft detection).

post.summary: Revoke a refresh-token family

get.summary: Return the authenticated user
List the caller's active organization memberships

post.summary: Create an organization; the caller becomes its initial OWNER atomically

201.description: Created. Includes the caller's role and resolved capabilities.

get.summary: Fetch an organization (requires organization.read)
get.description: Non-members receive 404 (existence concealment); members lacking a capability receive 403.

patch.summary: Update organization profile (requires organization.update; optimistic locking via version)

get.summary: List active members (requires organization.members.read)

delete.summary: Remove a member (requires organization.members.remove; rank rules; last-owner protected; self-removal allowed except last owner)

put.summary: Change a member's role (requires organization.roles.manage — OWNER only; self-change forbidden; last-owner protected)

get.summary: List invitations (requires organization.members.read)

post.summary: Invite by email (requires organization.members.invite; ADMIN may invite MEMBER role only; raw token delivered solely via email)
Revoke a pending invitation (requires organization.members.invite; idempotent for already-revoked)
Accept an invitation token (authenticated; account email must match the invitation; single-use)

post.summary: Validate a map of attribute values against a category’s effective specification template
Create a category (requires TAXONOMY_WRITE)

patch.summary: Update a category, including re-parenting (requires TAXONOMY_WRITE; optimistic version)

post.summary: Activate or deactivate a category (requires TAXONOMY_WRITE)

put.summary: Create or update a category translation (requires TAXONOMY_WRITE)

post.summary: Create an attribute (requires TAXONOMY_WRITE)

parameters.name: locale
parameters.description: BCP-47 locale; server falls back to en.

Approve, reject or deprecate a brand (requires BRAND_APPROVE)

post.summary: Create a certification (requires TAXONOMY_WRITE)
Create a unit of measure (requires TAXONOMY_WRITE)

fallback.description: Deterministic fallback (en for all but en)

SupplierApplicationStatus.description: Clients must tolerate unknown future values.

ScanStatus.description: Phase 7 never marks evidence CLEAN (deferred scanner).

VerificationScopeStatus.description: Scope-based; there is no verified boolean anywhere.

SupplierCapability.description: Org-scoped supplier capabilities; clients must tolerate unknown future values.

originalLocale.description: BCP 47 code of the authoring language

stale.description: Source content advanced past this translation

filename.description: Stored as metadata only; the storage key is server-generated

mediaType.description: Must be one of application/pdf, image/jpeg, image/png, image/webp

url.description: Short-lived presigned URL — a single-use secret

expectedSha256.description: Optional; cross-checked against the server digest

evidenceIds.description: Evidence linkage is required for a grant

password.description: Minimum 12 characters; checked against the platform password policy server-side. Paste always permitted (WCAG 3.3.8).

refreshToken.description: Opaque, single-use, rotating; stored hashed server-side

Locale.description: Clients must tolerate unknown future values.

OrganizationType.description: Clients must tolerate unknown future values.

OrganizationRole.description: Rank order OWNER > ADMIN > MEMBER; see organizations-capability-model.md.

Capability.description: Typed capabilities; clients must tolerate unknown future values.

version.description: Optimistic-locking version from the last read; mismatch → 409

role.description: OWNER cannot be invited; promote after joining. ADMIN actors may set MEMBER only.

Problem.description: RFC 9457 problem details. Content type application/problem+json.

message.description: Locale-resolved; code maps to frontend i18n keys

CategoryClassification.description: Clients must tolerate unknown future values.

AttributeDataType.description: Clients must tolerate unknown future values.

UnitFamily.description: Clients must tolerate unknown future values.

BrandType.description: Clients must tolerate unknown future values.

BrandApprovalStatus.description: Clients must tolerate unknown future values.

TranslationSourceKind.description: Clients must tolerate unknown future values. Taxonomy’s own clone of the translation-source vocabulary (ADR-020 bounded-context rule).

TaxonomyCapability.description: Platform-staff capabilities for taxonomy administration; clients must tolerate unknown future values.

name.description: Resolved display name for the requested/fallback locale.

slug.description: Primary SEO slug in the resolved locale, if authored.

translationStatuses.description: Per-locale translation status summary, keyed by locale code.

category.description: Clients must tolerate unknown future values.

inherited.description: true when defined on an ancestor category rather than this one.

values.description: Map of attributeCode to raw string value.

message.description: Locale-resolved; code maps to frontend i18n keys.

originalLocale.description: BCP 47 code of the authoring language.

category.description: Clients must tolerate unknown future values.

EmailNotVerified.description: Credentials valid but email not verified; problem type .../problems/email-not-verified.

Conflict.description: Resource conflict (e.g. email already registered, optimistic-lock version mismatch, duplicate membership, last-owner invariant).

Forbidden.description: Authenticated member lacks the required capability (problem type .../problems/authorization).

NotFound.description: Resource absent — or concealed from non-members by tenancy policy.

RateLimited.description: Too many requests; Retry-After header set.
